message:
Improve convert() functions for data deserialization

- Remove unused `schema` parameter from convert(data, concepts_map)
- Add error handling for non-string elements in list fields
- Add port bounds validation (0-65535) in web::configuration
- Update doc comments to remove references to phased-out header

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
